title: Boolean algebra and logic circuits
summary: 9618 A Level Boolean algebra — simplification, Karnaugh maps, and combinational circuits.
learningObjectives: Apply Boolean laws to simplify expressions.
Use Karnaugh maps for minimal SOP.
Design half and full adder circuits.

simpleExplanation.title: Logic as algebra
simpleExplanation.summary: Boolean variables are 0 or 1. Gates implement operators; Karnaugh maps group terms for minimal circuits.
steps: AND, OR, NOT, NAND, NOR, XOR gates.
De Morgan: NOT(A AND B) = NOT A OR NOT B.
Full adder: sum and carry from two bits.

sections.content: **Boolean algebra** (15.2) is heavily examined. Use the **interactive logic builder** to test gate combinations.
